name: distortionz_shotspotter
changelog: v1.1.8 — Added README.md with overview, features, dependencies, installation, and credits. Standardized GitHub repo metadata (badges, dynamic version pull, MIT license, Qbox required). v1.1.7 — Dispatch card moved to right side, vertically centered. Same right edge (right:24px) with top:50% + transform:translateY(-50%) so the card sits at mid-screen. Chat notify stays at top-right corner; this card sits at mid-right. v1.1.6 — (broken) left-side position.
